title: D&D 2024 Feat
description: Single schema covering BOTH data/origin_feats.json and data/general_feats.json. Both files have the same outer shape: a one-key wrapper ('origin_feats' or 'general_feats') around a map of feat_name -> feat entry. A single schema is used instead of two because per-feat entries are structurally identical (description, benefits, category, prerequisite, source, optional choices/choice_effects/effects); only the wrapper key differs. The wrapper key is restricted via maxProperties=1 and the per-key pattern so each file remains self-describing.
